summary_en: 5,040,000 shares (limit); ¥21.0B ceiling; ToSTNeT-3; May 21, 2026, 08:45 JST execution window. Cumulative execution under Jan 29, 2026 board authorization (¥200B / 54M shares / 6.1% S/O through Jan 29, 2027): 18.99M shares, ¥84.4B acquired to date.
title_en: Notice of acquisition of treasury stock through off-exchange buyback transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Canon announces a block execution of treasury stock acquisition on May 21, 2026. The company will place a buy order at the close price of ¥4,171 per share (or last special quote) in the TSE's ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange session at 08:45 JST, limited to that trading window only. The block is capped at 5,040,000 shares with an upper limit of ¥21.021 billion. Results will be disclosed after execution. This execution is part of the board-authorized program from January 29, 2026, which authorized acquisition of up to 54 million shares (6.1% of shares outstanding) for up to ¥200 billion through January 29, 2027, using both ToSTNeT-3 and open-market methods. As of the announcement date, Canon has already acquired 18.99 million shares for ¥84.4 billion under this program.
